import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import{useParams}from'react-router-dom';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const MovieDetails=()=>{const{id}=useParams();const[movie,setMovie]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');const[isSubscribed,setIsSubscribed]=useState(false);useEffect(()=>{const fetchMovie=async()=>{try{const res=await fetch(`/api/movies/${id}`);const data=await res.json();if(!res.ok)throw new Error(data.message||'Failed to fetch movie');setMovie(data);}catch(err){setError(err.message);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchMovie();},[id]);useEffect(()=>{const checkSubscription=async()=>{try{const token=localStorage.getItem('token');if(!token)return;const res=await fetch('/api/subscription/status',{headers:{'Authorization':`Bearer ${token}`}});const data=await res.json();setIsSubscribed(data.isSubscribed);}catch(err){console.error('Failed to check subscription:',err);}};checkSubscription();},[]);// Function to get movie poster URL based on title
